content: Adding an Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) to a Sales Prospecting AI Agent would reward the agent for autonomously exploring under-segmented, low-obviousness niche prospect groups that traditional rule-based prospecting tools would ignore, rather than only chasing high-fit leads that match pre-defined qualification criteria. This would unlock a constant stream of new untapped prospect segments that human sales reps would never think to target, turning static prospecting into an self-improving exploratory process.
